stages.caveat: RECON, cross-checked by the AMSSRAB 3-model ensemble (all 3 agree, Amazon->La Plata 16-20%); full annual ensemble is the next step.
f_loss is NOT backtestable (no deforestation counterfactual) -> reported as a scenario range, not a point.
Annual elasticity validated on SIGN/RANK across states; magnitude under-predicted in severe drought years (seasonal/nonlinear).
Transparent published-coefficient translation; EPISTEMIC VaR (not a year-to-year aleatory tail).
Depends on S1-S4; $/ha is a 30-yr-NPV lower bound (water + one crop).

_note: Confidence is per stage, carried in provenance; honesty is the product.
